targets.boundary: Company-wide footprint including products and supply chain
targets.notes: Stated as part of Apple’s 2030 carbon-neutral plan; remaining emissions to be addressed via carbon removal/credits.
targets.title: Reduce overall carbon footprint 75% by 2030 (vs 2015)

targets.boundary: Company-wide footprint including products and supply chain
targets.notes: Net carbon neutrality by 2030, combining emissions reductions with carbon removals for residual emissions.
targets.title: Carbon neutral across entire footprint by 2030
